creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 143962
devel/codeville [UPDATE] - OBSOLETES previous file(s)

Here's the update (codeville.shar).
This passes all tests;
portlint(1)
make fetch
make config
make patch
make

The next version, unless I decide to take on PSYCO [unlikely]
will remove all references to it. In both the src, as well as
plist.

Thank you for all your time, and consideration, John.
I hope this will meet all your [well justified] requirements. :)

--Chris
